'''Altier''' was an astronomical object located in the [[Altier system/Legends|Altier system]],<ref name="Journal5" /> a part of the [[Altier sector/Legends|Altier sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" />

At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Skyjumper]]'', [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by its [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Drev Jalok]], and his co-pilot, [[Sullub Soonin]], attempted to deliver a potentially profitable cargo to Altier. While in transit and far from the Altier [[Star system/Legends|system]], however, the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was intercepted by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] crew of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Sable III]]'', which forced the ''Skyjumper'' to exit [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and then disabled the vessel.<ref name="Journal5" />

==Behind the scenes==
Altier was mentioned in "[[Stand and Deliver]]," an article authored by [[John J. Richardson III]] and published in the [[February]] [[1995]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]].<ref name="Journal5" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Altier system, and therefore the celestial body Altier, in grid square O-13.<ref name="TEA" />
